channel.title: Active Directory on gobakos --verbose
channel.description: Recent content in Active Directory on gobakos --verbose

item.title: When there is no SPN: Understanding NTLM Coercion, Relay and RBCD
item.description: From NTLM and Kerberos fundamentals to WebDAV coercion, relay, SMB signing, channel binding, RBCD and the SPN-less variant. Covers how each piece connects and what actually stops it.
